_comment: Configuration for the automated HTF zone refresh scheduler. refresh_interval_hours = how often to automatically refresh zones. refresh_on_session_open = list of trading sessions that trigger a zone refresh when they open. stale_threshold_hours = warn if any zone file hasn't been updated in this many hours. enabled = master switch for the scheduler.

session_times._comment: UTC times for session opens. Used to trigger zone refresh at session start.
